code:
---
config:
  layout:
  look: classic
  heme: redux-dark
---
stateDiagram
            [Logistics_Warehouse] --> PullRequestsList
            state PullRequestsList {Logistics_Warehouse] --> PRL
                PRL --> PRLFiltered: apply filters and/or sorts
                PRLFiltered --> PRL: disable filters and sorts
                PRL --> PRL: move to page
                PRLFiltered --> PRLFiltered: move to page
            }
            PullRequestsList --> PREdit: Create PullRequests
            PREdit --> [Logistics_DeliveryRoute]: Confirm creation 
            PREdit --> PullRequestsList: cancelss
            PullRequestsList --> PRView: view PullRequest
            PRView --> PullRequestsList: back
            PRView --> [Logistics_TrackingNumber]: author approves
            PRView --> PREdit: author edits PullRequest
            PREdit --> [Logistics_Warehouse]: author confirm edit
            state PREdit{Logistics_FleetManagement] --> PREditor
              PREditor --> PRPreview: preview rendered page
              PRPreview --> PREditor: back to editor tab
            }
            state PRView {Logistics_StockLevel] --> PRPost
              PRPost --> PRChanges : view changes
              PRChanges --> PRPost : view commit post & comments
            }

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为物流系统设计一个Pull Request的状态流转图。核心是从Logistics_Warehouse进入，先有一个PullRequestsList作为入口状态。
明白，PullRequestsList作为一个复合状态。里面包含PRL和PRLFiltered两个子状态，以及它们之间的筛选切换和分页逻辑，对吗？
对，PRL到PRLFiltered是apply filters and/or sorts，反向是disable filters and sorts。两个状态都要支持move to page。然后从PullRequestsList可以创建PR，进入PREdit状态。
好的，PREdit我设计为复合状态，内部包含Logistics_FleetManagement指向PREditor，然后PREditor和PRPreview之间可以来回切换。创建确认后到达Logistics_DeliveryRoute。
还需要查看PR的视图。从PullRequestsList进入PRView，作者可以approve并到达Logistics_TrackingNumber，或者edit回到PREdit。PRView内部要有PRPost和PRChanges的切换。
确认一下，PRView的入口是Logistics_StockLevel指向PRPost？然后PRPost和PRChanges互相切换，一个看commit post和comments，一个看changes？
是的。另外PREdit编辑完成后，作者confirm edit应该回到Logistics_Warehouse。还有PREdit取消的话是回到PullRequestsList，注意这里有个拼写错误，应该是cancel不是cancelss。
已修正为cancel。整个流程：从Logistics_Warehouse进入列表，支持筛选分页，创建PR经过PREdit（含预览）到DeliveryRoute，或查看PRView（含StockLevel和Changes切换）进行approve到TrackingNumber或编辑。
